name: Smartlook
description: Smartlook is a qualitative analytics platform for web and mobile apps. Search session recordings, analyze events and funnels, manage visitors, configure webhooks, and export analytics data via the REST API.

capabilities.name: sessions_search
capabilities.description: Search and filter session recordings by date, duration, and attributes.

capabilities.name: sessions_get
capabilities.description: Get detailed information about a specific session recording.

capabilities.name: sessions_get_public_link
capabilities.description: Generate a shareable public link for a session recording.

capabilities.name: events_list
capabilities.description: List tracked events with filtering and aggregation.

capabilities.name: events_get
capabilities.description: Retrieve details of a specific tracked event.

capabilities.name: events_get_visitors
capabilities.description: Get visitors who triggered a specific event.

capabilities.name: events_delete
capabilities.description: Delete a tracked event definition.

capabilities.name: funnels_list
capabilities.description: List funnels with conversion rates and step breakdowns.

capabilities.name: funnels_get
capabilities.description: Retrieve details of a specific funnel with drop-off analysis.

capabilities.name: funnels_get_dropoff_visitors
capabilities.description: Get visitors who dropped off at each funnel step.

capabilities.name: visitors_get
capabilities.description: Retrieve details of a specific visitor.

capabilities.name: visitors_search
capabilities.description: Search visitors by properties, identity, or behavior.

capabilities.name: visitors_get_sessions
capabilities.description: Get all session recordings for a specific visitor.

capabilities.name: visitors_get_events
capabilities.description: Get all events triggered by a specific visitor.

capabilities.name: visitors_delete
capabilities.description: Delete a visitor and all associated data.

capabilities.name: visitors_bulk_delete
capabilities.description: Bulk-delete multiple visitors and their data.

capabilities.name: webhooks_create
capabilities.description: Create a webhook for real-time event notifications.

capabilities.name: webhooks_list
capabilities.description: List all configured webhooks.

capabilities.name: webhooks_get
capabilities.description: Retrieve details of a specific webhook.

capabilities.name: webhooks_update
capabilities.description: Update a webhook's URL or subscribed events.

capabilities.name: webhooks_delete
capabilities.description: Delete a webhook.

capabilities.name: project_get
capabilities.description: Retrieve information about the current project.

capabilities.name: statistics_get
capabilities.description: Retrieve API usage statistics.
